## Summary

- 
- 

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run type-check`
- [ ] `npm test -- --runInBand`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `cd client && npm run build`
- [ ] Manual UI check, if user-facing

## Deployment notes

- [ ] Works in local full-stack mode
- [ ] Works in the GitHub Pages static client, or backend-only behavior is guarded
- [ ] No new required environment variables, or docs were updated

## Screenshots or recordings

Add UI evidence for visual or interaction changes.
